race.comment: Very even. ALTROVE (5) has been ticking along well, not beaten far all three this time in. Jumps in weight but senior rider goes aboard for this and should be hard to stop. BRAZEN FLING (2) is going better than form suggests finishing fourth at Mornington two back then a close-up fifth there last time. Looks a leading chance. CORTAIN (8) returned from a long spell with an eye-catching run here, coming home hard to miss by a nose. Can only be fitter and a repeat would see him in the finish. BUBBLES TIME (10) turned in a better run last time, coming from well off the pace to finish runner-up on heavy ground. CHOSEN VENTURE (1) is better than the last run in a hot form race suggests.
